npc_seeds.name: The Desert Oracle
npc_seeds.summary: An older Setite mystic who maintains a hidden temple outside the city, offering visions and spiritual 'unbinding' to those desperate enough to seek them.
possible_plots: Provides a cryptic vision about the Prince's fate, demanding that the coterie free one of her cultists from Camarilla custody in return.
Offers to remove a supernatural curse or addiction from a PC—but only if they submit to a private Typhonic Rite.
Holds forbidden knowledge about the city's past Setite activity that could expose high-ranking elders.

npc_seeds.name: Club Serpent Proprietor
npc_seeds.summary: A charming Setite who runs a popular nightclub frequented by both mortals and Kindred, using the venue to recruit, blackmail, and worship in equal measure.
npc_seeds.temperament: playful, observant, ruthless beneath the smiles
possible_plots: Hosts an Elysium-adjacent event where a 'private back room' becomes the site of a scandal the PCs are dragged into.
Pressures the coterie to look the other way as mortal guests disappear into the Setite network.
Offers exclusive access and favors to the PCs in exchange for discreetly spreading certain rumors among the Camarilla.

npc_seeds.name: The Vice Chaplain
npc_seeds.summary: A Setite embedded in a network of rehab clinics, shelters, or self-help groups, using the language of healing to bind broken souls to Set.
npc_seeds.role: spiritual counselor and handler of the vulnerable
possible_plots: A mortal contact of the PCs vanishes into the Chaplain's program and returns fanatically devoted to 'a new path'.
The Chaplain offers to 'stabilize' a ghoul or mortal ally whose addiction is causing problems, twisting that bond towards Set.
The Chaplain leaks just enough information to manipulate the coterie into eliminating a rival cult or Sabbat pack.

npc_seeds.name: The Occult Curator
npc_seeds.summary: A well-connected Setite scholar who curates an occult bookstore, museum wing, or private collection of artifacts, trading lore and relics at steep spiritual prices.
npc_seeds.temperament: wry, academic, fascinated by the coterie
possible_plots: Offers the PCs a relic or text critical to their investigation, demanding they retrieve a different item from a rival Tremere chantry.
Warns the coterie of an impending disaster in exchange for a promise that they will sabotage a Camarilla initiative.
Secretly uses artifacts to nudge mortals and Kindred alike toward religious experiences that align with Setite doctrine.

npc_seeds.name: The Embedded Officer
npc_seeds.summary: A Setite with deep ties to law enforcement or city bureaucracy, using legal and procedural power to shield cult operations and harass enemies.
npc_seeds.temperament: calm, bureaucratic, darkly amused by procedural cruelty
possible_plots: Arranges for the PCs' mortal enemies to be arrested, then expects repayment when those cases mysteriously vanish.
Uses zoning laws, inspections, or raids to pressure Anarch havens, pushing them toward Setite 'protection'.
Demands the coterie help cover up a Masquerade breach caused by the cult in exchange for access to sensitive police data.

npc_seeds.name: The Penitent Serpent
npc_seeds.summary: A Setite who has begun to doubt the clan's methods but cannot fully abandon faith in Set, creating a volatile mix of guilt, loyalty, and desperation.
npc_seeds.role: potential traitor, double agent, or tragic ally
npc_seeds.temperament: brooding, intense, oscillating between kindness and fanaticism
possible_plots: Approaches the PCs for confession-like conversations, slowly revealing internal Setite politics and vulnerabilities.
Offers to sabotage a Setite plot in exchange for protection, drawing the coterie into a web of reprisals.
Is forced by their superiors to prove loyalty by betraying the PCs, creating a fraught, high-drama confrontation.
